mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_report(post_id, user_id, reason, description, status) VALUES(#{postId}, #{userId}, #{reason}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, user_id, reason, description, status, admin_id, handle_time, create_time FROM post_report WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE post_report SET status = #{status}, admin_id = #{adminId}, handle_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
